name: Baumer Holding AG
lede: Baumer runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Vapi, covering manufacturing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Baumer office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Baumer Holding AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Baumer runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Vapi), covering manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Baumer's India footprint covers Pune and Vapi, spanning manufacturing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Measuring Devices and Controllers, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Baumer operate in India?
faq.a: Baumer operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Baumer have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Baumer's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Vapi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Baumer run in India?
faq.a: Baumer runs manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Baumer's India GCCs?
faq.a: Baumer's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Baumer's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 8 leaders at Baumer's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
